headline: Palm Valley Capital Fund Q2 2026 Portfolio Activity
summary: Palm Valley Capital Fund acquired three new positions during the second quarter: The Clorox Company, Molson Coors Beverage Company, and Vontier Corp. Read more here.

headline: Palm Valley Capital’s New Addition: The Clorox Company (CLX)
summary: Palm Valley Capital Management, an investment management firm, has issued the second-quarter 2026 investor letter for the “Palm Valley Capital Fund.” A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. In the second quarter, the fund’s investor class gained 1.80%, while the S&P SmallCap 600 rose 19.7% and the Morningstar Small Cap Total Return Index returned […]

headline: Mommy’s Bliss Appoints Natalie Hagstrom as CEO
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, July 08, 2026--Mommy’s Bliss, a prominent brand in the baby and family wellness category and a Swander Pace Capital ("SPC") portfolio company, today announced the appointment of Natalie Hagstrom as the Chief Executive Officer. Natalie assumes the role, succeeding Yasmin Kaderali, who served as CEO and will transition to Chief Mom Advisor and remain an active board member and strategic advisor to the Company.
